description: The ``Pack ProtoFlux Nodes`` node takes in the Slot root (where we want to pack to), and the Slot target (the set of ProtoFlux nodes we want to pack), then packs them into the Slot. Many community-based tools (such as Redprint) use this to pack nodes into slots.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Calls an impulse to pack our selected nodes.
fields.Root: The Slot we want to pack our nodes in.
fields.Target: The target set of connected nodes we want to pack.
